title: paullinia racemosa
intro: Paullinia racemosa is a plant species commonly known as the 'Quebra-Pé' or 'Squash Balm', belonging to the family Sapindaceae. Traditionally, Paullinia racemosa has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts and herbal preparations have been found to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antiviral properties. Paullinia racemosa is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
